mapper.select: SELECT r.round_no AS roundNo, r.member_no AS memberNo, m.nickname, r.ranking, r.grade, r.elps_cnt AS elpsCnt, r.sel_num_cnt AS selNumCnt, r.win_cnt AS winCnt, r.cont_lost_cnt AS contLostCnt, r.prev_ranking AS prevRanking, r.prev_grade AS prevGrade, CASE WHEN r.sel_num_cnt > 0 THEN ROUND(r.win_cnt * 100.0 / r.sel_num_cnt, 1) ELSE 0.0 END AS hitRate, CASE WHEN r.prev_ranking IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CAST(r.prev_ranking AS SIGNED) - CAST(r.ranking AS SIGNED) END AS rankChange, CASE WHEN p.member_no IS NOT NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS hasPred FROM MEM_RANK_ALL r JOIN MEM_JOIN_INFO m ON r.member_no = m.member_no LEFT JOIN MEM_PRED_NUM p ON p.member_no = r.member_no AND p.round_no = (SELECT MAX(round_no) + 1 FROM LTT_ROUND_RESULT) WHERE r.round_no = (SELECT MAX(ROUND_NO) FROM LTT_ROUND_RESULT) ORDER BY r.ranking LIMIT 6

SELECT r.round_no AS roundNo, r.member_no AS memberNo, m.nickname, r.ranking, r.last_sel_cnt AS lastSelCnt, r.win_cnt AS winCnt, r.lost_cnt AS lostCnt, r.prev_ranking AS prevRanking, CASE WHEN r.last_sel_cnt > 0 THEN ROUND(r.win_cnt * 100.0 / r.last_sel_cnt, 1) ELSE 0.0 END AS hitRate, CASE WHEN r.prev_ranking IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CAST(r.prev_ranking AS SIGNED) - CAST(r.ranking AS SIGNED) END AS rankChange FROM MEM_RANK_5ROUND r JOIN MEM_JOIN_INFO m ON r.member_no = m.member_no WHERE r.round_no = (SELECT MAX(ROUND_NO) FROM LTT_ROUND_RESULT) ORDER BY r.ranking LIMIT 6

SELECT r.round_no AS roundNo, r.member_no AS memberNo, m.nickname, r.ranking, r.grade, r.elps_cnt AS elpsCnt, r.sel_num_cnt AS selNumCnt, r.win_cnt AS winCnt, r.cont_lost_cnt AS contLostCnt, r.prev_ranking AS prevRanking, r.prev_grade AS prevGrade, CASE WHEN r.sel_num_cnt > 0 THEN ROUND(r.win_cnt * 100.0 / r.sel_num_cnt, 1) ELSE 0.0 END AS hitRate, CASE WHEN r.prev_ranking IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CAST(r.prev_ranking AS SIGNED) - CAST(r.ranking AS SIGNED) END AS rankChange FROM MEM_RANK_ALL r JOIN MEM_JOIN_INFO m ON r.member_no = m.member_no WHERE r.member_no = #{memberNo} ORDER BY r.round_no DESC

SELECT r.round_no AS roundNo, r.member_no AS memberNo, m.nickname, r.ranking, r.last_sel_cnt AS lastSelCnt, r.win_cnt AS winCnt, r.lost_cnt AS lostCnt, r.prev_ranking AS prevRanking, CASE WHEN r.last_sel_cnt > 0 THEN ROUND(r.win_cnt * 100.0 / r.last_sel_cnt, 1) ELSE 0.0 END AS hitRate, CASE WHEN r.prev_ranking IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CAST(r.prev_ranking AS SIGNED) - CAST(r.ranking AS SIGNED) END AS rankChange FROM MEM_RANK_5ROUND r JOIN MEM_JOIN_INFO m ON r.member_no = m.member_no WHERE r.member_no = #{memberNo} ORDER BY r.round_no DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEM_PRED_NUM WHERE round_no = (SELECT MAX(round_no) + 1 FROM LTT_ROUND_RESULT)

SELECT r.ranking AS ranking, p.member_no AS memberNo, m.nickname, p.pred_num AS predNum, p.submit_at AS submitAt FROM MEM_PRED_NUM p JOIN MEM_JOIN_INFO m ON p.member_no = m.member_no LEFT JOIN MEM_RANK_ALL r ON r.member_no = p.member_no AND r.round_no = (SELECT MAX(round_no) FROM LTT_ROUND_RESULT) WHERE p.round_no = (SELECT MAX(round_no) + 1 FROM LTT_ROUND_RESULT) ORDER BY ${sortCol} ${sortDir} LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEM_RANK_ALL WHERE round_no = (SELECT MAX(ROUND_NO) FROM LTT_ROUND_RESULT)

SELECT r.round_no AS roundNo, r.member_no AS memberNo, m.nickname, r.ranking, r.grade, r.elps_cnt AS elpsCnt, r.sel_num_cnt AS selNumCnt, r.win_cnt AS winCnt, r.cont_lost_cnt AS contLostCnt, r.prev_ranking AS prevRanking, r.prev_grade AS prevGrade, CASE WHEN r.sel_num_cnt > 0 THEN ROUND(r.win_cnt * 100.0 / r.sel_num_cnt, 1) ELSE 0.0 END AS hitRate, CASE WHEN r.prev_ranking IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CAST(r.prev_ranking AS SIGNED) - CAST(r.ranking AS SIGNED) END AS rankChange, p.pred_num AS predNum, p.hit_yn AS hitYn FROM MEM_RANK_ALL r JOIN MEM_JOIN_INFO m ON r.member_no = m.member_no LEFT JOIN MEM_PRED_NUM p ON p.member_no = r.member_no AND p.round_no = (SELECT MAX(round_no) FROM LTT_ROUND_RESULT) WHERE r.round_no = (SELECT MAX(ROUND_NO) FROM LTT_ROUND_RESULT) ORDER BY ${sortCol} ${sortDir} LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEM_RANK_5ROUND WHERE round_no = (SELECT MAX(ROUND_NO) FROM LTT_ROUND_RESULT)

SELECT r.round_no AS roundNo, r.member_no AS memberNo, m.nickname, r.ranking, r.last_sel_cnt AS lastSelCnt, r.win_cnt AS winCnt, r.lost_cnt AS lostCnt, r.prev_ranking AS prevRanking, CASE WHEN r.last_sel_cnt > 0 THEN ROUND(r.win_cnt * 100.0 / r.last_sel_cnt, 1) ELSE 0.0 END AS hitRate, CASE WHEN r.prev_ranking IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CAST(r.prev_ranking AS SIGNED) - CAST(r.ranking AS SIGNED) END AS rankChange, p.pred_num AS predNum, p.hit_yn AS hitYn FROM MEM_RANK_5ROUND r JOIN MEM_JOIN_INFO m ON r.member_no = m.member_no LEFT JOIN MEM_PRED_NUM p ON p.member_no = r.member_no AND p.round_no = (SELECT MAX(round_no) FROM LTT_ROUND_RESULT) WHERE r.round_no = (SELECT MAX(ROUND_NO) FROM LTT_ROUND_RESULT) ORDER BY r.ranking LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT r.round_no AS roundNo, r.member_no AS memberNo, m.nickname, r.ranking, r.grade, r.elps_cnt AS elpsCnt, r.sel_num_cnt AS selNumCnt, r.win_cnt AS winCnt, r.cont_lost_cnt AS contLostCnt, r.prev_ranking AS prevRanking, r.prev_grade AS prevGrade, CASE WHEN r.sel_num_cnt > 0 THEN ROUND(r.win_cnt * 100.0 / r.sel_num_cnt, 1) ELSE 0.0 END AS hitRate, CASE WHEN r.prev_ranking IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CAST(r.prev_ranking AS SIGNED) - CAST(r.ranking AS SIGNED) END AS rankChange FROM MEM_RANK_ALL r JOIN MEM_JOIN_INFO m ON r.member_no = m.member_no WHERE r.member_no = #{memberNo} ORDER BY r.round_no DESC LIMIT 1
